name: DefaultMapEntry
javadoc:
/**
 * A restricted implementation of {@link java.util.Map.Entry Map.Entry} that prevents
 * the {@link java.util.Map.Entry Map.Entry} contract from being broken.
 *
 * @since 3.0
 * @version $Id: DefaultMapEntry.java 1533984 2013-10-20 21:12:51Z tn $
 */

members.name: DefaultMapEntry
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Constructs a new entry with the specified key and given value.
 *
 * @param key  the key for the entry, may be null
 * @param value  the value for the entry, may be null
 */

tags.name: key
tags.content: the key for the entry, may be null
tags.description: the key for the entry, may be null

tags.name: value
tags.content: the value for the entry, may be null
tags.description: the value for the entry, may be null

members.name: DefaultMapEntry
members.javadoc: /** * Constructs a new entry from the specified KeyValue. * * @param pair the pair to copy, must not be null * @throws NullPointerException if the entry is null */

tags.name: pair
tags.content: the pair to copy, must not be null
tags.description: the pair to copy, must not be null

members.name: DefaultMapEntry
members.javadoc: /** * Constructs a new entry from the specified Map.Entry. * * @param entry the entry to copy, must not be null * @throws NullPointerException if the entry is null */

tags.name: entry
tags.content: the entry to copy, must not be null
tags.description: the entry to copy, must not be null
